VariableID:3157:2.name: color/disabled/brand-light
VariableID:3157:2.description: Fill brand disabled (light mode). Usado como alvo de semantic.brand.disabled. ADR-007.

VariableID:3157:3.name: color/disabled/brand-dark
VariableID:3157:3.description: Fill brand disabled (dark mode). Opaco — já representa a cor final.

VariableID:2871:2.name: space/inset/2xs
VariableID:2871:2.description: 2px. Compact inset for small components like Badge. References foundation.spacing.0-5.

VariableID:2905:2.name: border/control/default
VariableID:2905:2.description: Border for interactive controls (Input, Select, Textarea, Checkbox, Radio). WCAG 1.4.11 ≥3:1. (ADR-009)

VariableID:2905:3.name: border/control/hover
VariableID:2905:3.description: Border on hover for interactive controls. (ADR-009)

VariableID:2905:4.name: border/control/disabled
VariableID:2905:4.description: Border for disabled controls. Exempt from contrast per WCAG 1.4.3. (ADR-009)

VariableID:3197:2.name: space/gap/2xs
VariableID:3197:2.description: 2px. Gap muito compacto — Label Row de form controls. Issue #24.1.

VariableID:3273:2.name: typography/body/font-family/sans
VariableID:3273:2.description: Font-family sans-serif padrão do sistema. Alias para foundation. ADR-013.

VariableID:3273:3.name: typography/body/font-weight/regular
VariableID:3273:3.description: Peso regular (400). Usar em body text, descrições, placeholders.

VariableID:3273:4.name: typography/body/font-weight/medium
VariableID:3273:4.description: Peso medium (500). Usar em labels, links secundários, ênfase leve.

VariableID:3273:5.name: typography/body/font-weight/semibold
VariableID:3273:5.description: Peso semibold (600). Usar em títulos, headings, ênfase forte em UI.

VariableID:3273:6.name: typography/body/font-weight/bold
VariableID:3273:6.description: Peso bold (700). Usar em títulos de destaque e em negrito inline dentro de body text.

VariableID:3273:7.name: typography/body/letter-spacing/normal
VariableID:3273:7.description: Letter-spacing neutro (0). Padrão pra body text e UI.

VariableID:3273:8.name: typography/body/letter-spacing/tight
VariableID:3273:8.description: Letter-spacing apertado (-0.02em). Usar em display/headings grandes.

VariableID:3273:13.name: typography/body/font-size/xl
VariableID:3273:13.description: Font-size 20px. Títulos de card, headings H3.

VariableID:3273:14.name: typography/body/font-size/2xl
VariableID:3273:14.description: Font-size 24px. Headings H2, títulos de modal.

VariableID:3273:18.name: typography/body/line-height/md
VariableID:3273:18.description: Line-height 24px. Pareia com body/font-size/md (16px). Substitui tanto lh/22 quanto lh/24 antigos.
